claim: THE MOAT, end-to-end: the network measured 9 heterogeneous EU strangers, PARTITIONED them into 2 optimal-hop rings (greedy fewest-hops-first), served MiniMax-M2.5 on BOTH SIMULTANEOUSLY, and every content class clears the 20 bar. Fewer hops => higher per-stream: the 2-hop fat-card ring is the fastest scattered ring measured to date.

pool.off_ring_reason: 3 consumer cards left = 28 layers, can't hold a 3rd 62-layer copy; pool ceiling = 2 full copies (166L capacity / 62). The loop found the maximum.

measured_caps.RTX PRO 6000 WS (cutlass, graph-clean): footprint 2329.5 MB/L, transient 72, layer_ms 0.207-0.24 graph, 35L density cap
measured_caps.RTX PRO 6000 WS (graph replay corrupt, c: eager 0.29-0.91 ms/L — EAGER-ADMITTED as a 33L middle in sw2 (deploy graph-OFF); a card an allowlist discards, the function routes
measured_caps.H100 NVL (marlin, MEASURED): footprint 4057.5 MB/L, repack transient +4824, layer_ms 0.184 graph — 20L on 93GB; the 80-95GB marlin tier now measured, not extrapolated

headline.swarm1_2hop_fat: 2x RTX PRO 6000 (CZ head[0:29] + LT tail[29:62]); reasoning 51.1 / tools 45.9 / summarize 40.7 / code 40.3 / qa 35.4 / mix 30.1 / prose 29.5 per-stream; solo 42.1; mix-B8 agg 160.6; 72/72 receipts
headline.swarm2_3hop_mixed: DK 5090 coord[0:9] + NO Pro EAGER[9:42] + BG H100 tail[42:62]; reasoning 34.7 / mix 25.2 / prose 22.6 / qa 24.8 per-stream; solo 37.9; 72/72 receipts — a graph-fail Pro + a marlin H100 still fully servable
headline.vs_prior: prose: 2-hop 29.5 > 4-hop hetero 23.4 > 6x5090 18.5 — the hop-count gradient is monotonic
headline.receipts_total: 144/144 valid across both rings served in parallel

env: fp8 wire+aux, CUDA graphs (eager where measured graph-corrupt), STATIC_KV, kv-maxlen 8192, B=8, receipts ON, K per (class,B), medians of 3, EU-scattered RTT 8.5-76ms
